Detected dataflow-on-top in function 'ipv4_top' (/mnt/scratch/pyuvaraj/Vitis_RoCE_W/Vitis_RoCE/fpga-network-stack/hls/ipv4/ipv4.cpp:280) with default interface mode 'ap_ctrl_hs'. Finished Loop, function and other optimizations: CPU user time: 0.36 seconds. CPU system time: 0.02 seconds. Elapsed time: 0.5 seconds; current allocated memory: 722.160 MB.
Process process_ipv4<512> is made part of the output synchronization in its dataflow region, because it has an external FIFO output and no PIPO output

Process process_ipv4<512> has both a successor and writes an output to its caller (see the GUI dataflow viewer). This may lead to lower throughput. Consider copying this output via a successor process.

Cosimulation may deadlock if process ipv4_generate_ipv4<512> has a streamed top-level array input and has predecessor processes. If a deadlock occurs, please consider converting the streamed array into an hls::stream
